parameters.content:
## CAIAC Demo - Lead Capture v1.2.0

Config-driven lead capture. Fetches per-client settings from Postgres using the `slug` query param on the webhook URL.

**Trigger:** POST /caiac/demo/lead?slug=CLIENT_SLUG
**Config source:** caiac.clients table (config->lead_capture)
**Changes from v1.1.0:** Adds Get Client Config Postgres lookup; notify_email, from_email, from_name, and sheet_id are all driven by client config. AI disclaimer appended to follow-up email.

parameters.query:
SELECT id as client_id, slug,
       config->'lead_capture'->>'notify_email' as notify_email,
       config->'lead_capture'->>'sheet_id' as sheet_id,
       COALESCE(config->'lead_capture'->>'from_name', 'CAIAC Digital') as from_name,
       COALESCE(config->'lead_capture'->>'from_email', 'caiacgroup@gmail.com') as from_email
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $('Receive Lead Form').item.json.query.slug ?? "henderson" }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-5", max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: "user", content: "You are a lead qualification assistant for CAIAC Digital, a Central Indiana company that sells private self-hosted AI systems and workflow automation to small businesses. Score this lead 1-10 based on how likely they are to become a paying client (consider: business type fit, challenge relevance, source quality). Draft a warm, professional follow-up email from Chad Wallace.

Respond ONLY with valid JSON, no other text:
{"score": 8, "score_reason": "reason here", "email_subject": "subject here", "email_body": "full email body here"}

Lead details:
Name: " + $('Extract Lead Data').first().json.name + "
Business Name: " + $('Extract Lead Data').first().json.business_name + "
Business Type: " + $('Extract Lead Data').first().json.business_type + "
Challenge: " + $('Extract Lead Data').first().json.challenge + "
How they heard about us: " + $('Extract Lead Data').first().json.source }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $json.email, name: $json.name }] }], from: { email: $('Parse AI Response').first().json.from_email, name: $('Parse AI Response').first().json.from_name }, subject: $json.email_subject, content: [{ type: 'text/plain', value: $json.email_body }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ personalizations: [{ to: [{ email: $('Parse AI Response').first().json.notify_email, name: "Chad Wallace" }] }], from: { email: $('Parse AI Response').first().json.from_email, name: "CAIAC Lead Alert" }, subject: "New Lead: " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.name + " (Score: " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.score + "/10)", content: [{ type: "text/plain", value: "Name: " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.name + "
Email: " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.email + "
Business: " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.business_type + "
Score: " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.score + "/10
Reason: " + $('Parse AI Response').first().json.score_reason }] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO caiac.ai_usage_log (client_id, workflow, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_estimate) VALUES ('{{ $json.client_id }}', '{{ $json.workflow }}', {{ $json.tokens_in }}, {{ $json.tokens_out }}, {{ $json.cost_estimate }});
